Q: Were any updates provided on the regulatory reviews? Do they provide a more comprehensive list (than the DMA) of the required approvals? Do they provide filing dates? Have any approvals already been received?
A: Yes, the filing provides a comprehensive list of required approvals beyond the DMA. U.S. approvals include HSR Act clearance from DOJ/FTC, SEC effectiveness of Form S-4, and NYSE listing approval for Boston Scientific shares. Non-U.S. approvals include EU competition law clearance (su

documents_triaged.reason: This document is only a search results page listing Penumbra Inc filings without containing actual content about regulatory approvals, antitrust review, government clearances, shareholder votes, or deal status changes.

This document is a Penumbra Inc. 10-K filing containing only financial and operational data with XML metadata tags; it contains no information about the Boston Scientific/Penumbra merger, regulatory approvals, antitrust review, or deal status.
